field.value: Fragment from the Res Gestae Inscription
Fragment from the Res Gestae Divi Augusti inscription at Monumentum Ancyranum.

ET.D.LAELIO.COS.ET.C.CALVISIO.ET.L.PASIENO.CONSVLIBVS.ET.L.L[ENTVLO.ET.]M.MESSALLA / CONSVLIBVS. ET.L.CANINIO.ET.Q.FABRICIO CO[S.M]IL[I]T[IBVS.]QVOS.EME / RITEIS.STIPENDIS.IN.SUA.MINICIPI[A.DEDVX]I PRIMIA.NVMERATO / PER.SOLVI QVAM.IN.REM.SESTER[TIVM.]Q[VATER.]MILLIE[NS.]CI[R]CI[TER] / IMPEND[I.] / QVATER.PECVNIA.MEA.IVVI.AERARIVM.ITA.VT.SESTERTIVM MILLIEN[S.]ET / QVING[ENTIEN]S.AD.EOS.[Q]VI.PRAERANT.AERARIO.DETVLERIM.ET.M.LEP[I]DO / ET.L.ARRVNTIO.COS.COS.I[N.]AERARIVM.MILITARE.QVOD.EX.CONSILIO.M[EO] / CO[N[ST[ITV]TVM.EST.EX[.QV]O.PRAEMIA.DARENTVR.MILITIBVS.QVI.VICENA. / [AVT.PLVRA.S]TIPE[NDI]A.EMERVISSENT. HS MILLIENS.ET.SEPTING[E]NTI / [ENS.EX PA]T[RI]MONIO[.M]EO.DETVLI / [VECTIGALIA.TVM].CENTVM MILLIBVS.H[OM]INVM.TVM PLVRIBVS.[MVL]TO.FRV
